title: Bundles Beyond
description: Allows you to access every item in the bundle beyond the vanilla 12 item limit.
body:
Since bundles were officially released, only up to **12 items** from the bundle are accessible from the inventory without taking out other items first. This mod **removes this limit** of 12 items allowing **all** items inside the bundle to be viewed **and extracted** This Modrinth page is the only official source of the mod! # Using this mod: ![bundle with 64 colored items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VhUy58Cq/images/82bda32b8da01e5c3b002e62980e25976eda2720.png) # Vanilla: ![image of only 8 items in the bundle and a +37 to indicate that there are 37 more items in the bundle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VhUy58Cq/images/f427ea5050879917397b0531abbeb7b85f1d7e28.png) **You can navigate in the bundle's gui with the movement or arrow keys.**
Press space while hovering over a bundle to put an item or take an item from the bundle! # Config screen Open the config screen from [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) in Fabric, from the Mods menu in NeoForge, or with `/bundlesbeyond`
Image coming here Soon™
# Keybinds There are 2 keybinds that you can find in Options > Controls:
### Mod Enabled keybind
If the mod is **On** or **Off**, pressing this keybind will toggle it.
If the mod is on **Hold key**, holding this keybind will enable the mod.
### Scroll Axis keybind
If the scroll mode is **Horizontal** or **Vertical**, pressing this keybind will toggle it.
If the scroll mode is on **Hold for horizontal**, holding this keybind will make the scrolling horizontal, releasing the button will make it vertical.
Same for **Hold for vertical**, but opposite. # Other Stuff This mod is **client side only**.
In the Fabric version, this mod **requires** [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).
[Bundles Beyond](https://modrinth.com/mod/bundles-beyond) is licensed under the [CC-BY-NC-SA 4.0 license](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/legalcode.txt).
